name: Cat Clicker RE
author: Poki
description: Cat Clicker RE is an idle clicker game where you must click on your cat to get cat points! Buying upgrades for your cat will increase the amount of clicks you make - like milk, catnip or a mouse to play with! By using Cat Sacrifice, you unlock more upgrades and cool new accessories for your furry friend, like a pair of sunglasses or a nice hat! Can you turn your kitten into the coolest cat around? How to play Cat Clicker RE? Clicking: Use the mouse to click your cat! Who created Cat Clicker RE? Cat Clicker RE is created by Denis Olenison. Play their other idle games on Poki: idle-miner and doggo-clicker! How can I play Cat Clicker RE for free? You can play Cat Clicker RE for free on Poki. Can I play Cat Clicker RE on mobile devices and desktop? Cat Clicker RE can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. /p>
